hookText: The conversation sat on my calendar for 3 days.
hookHighlight: AI didn't make it easy. Just easier.

hookText: 60% of schools have no AI rules.

hookHighlight: IT can't answer the hard questions.

hookText: 47 tabs open. None of them read.
Board meetings used to terrify me.
Every day, I hired a stranger.
hookHighlight: Then I gave it a job description.

hookText: The default voices sound like a GPS.

hookHighlight: By month three, I was drowning.

hookText: No staff. No curriculum. No systems.
83% of parents heard nothing from the school.
hookHighlight: Their kids already use AI daily.

hookText: You became a leader to shape education.

hookHighlight: Most schools still have no plan.

hookText: A meeting to plan the meeting.
I announced AI training. They rolled their eyes.
hookHighlight: Six months later, 80% use it daily.
I felt like I was getting away with something.

hookText: I skipped it for a month.
Every school has a strategic plan.
